verses.1: This is the burden against the Desert by the Sea:
verses.11: This is the burden against Dumah:
verses.13: This is the burden against Arabia:
verses.16: For this is what the Lord says to me: “Within one year, as a hired worker would count it, all the glory of Kedar will be gone.
verses.17: The remaining archers, the warriors of Kedar, will be few.” For the LORD, the God of Israel, has spoken.
